description_long: This house features a classic rectangular structure with a steeply pitched red gable roof and light-colored wooden siding. The front facade is distinguished by a large double barn-style door with black metal hinges and a small overhanging dormer above it. The roof includes two skylights, providing natural light to the upper level. Windows are symmetrically placed, with a double window on the rear and a small dormer window above the main entrance. The side walls are simple, with one side featuring no windows and the other side showing the two skylights. The overall design is reminiscent of a rural barn converted into a residential dwelling, blending rustic charm with functional simplicity.
description: A rectangular house with a steep red gable roof, barn-style double doors, skylights, and light wooden siding, evoking a rustic yet functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large barn-style double doors, overhanging dormer, and wooden siding.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the red gable roof and the placement of two skylights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a double window and the simple, light-colored siding.
description_view_3: Side view showing the length of the house, wooden siding, and the two skylights on the roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical placement with skylights and dormer
attribute_entryway_design: Large barn-style double doors with black metal hinges and a small overhanging dormer above
